data.title: LOBO integrates Shenzhen Xiangri's team into Jiangsu LOBO for PV energy; targets the energy storage power gen sector.
data.description: In Wuxi, China, on December 12, 2025, LOBO Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ: LOBO), a company specializing in electric mobility and smart energy solutions, shared that its subsidiary, Jiangsu LOBO Electric Vehicle Co. Ltd., has successfully brought on board the entire staff of Shenzhen Xiangri Technology Co., Ltd. This includes the research & development, sales, and business operation teams. This move has led to the formation of a Solar Division within Jiangsu LOBO, aimed at propelling the company into the photovoltaic energy-storage power generation market.
Fed's Hammack: Inflation is too high, stuck closer to 3% than 2%.

data.title: SYNEVIT® promotes healthy hair for men on International Men's Day. By age 35, two-thirds of American men face hair loss.
data.description: A skincare brand based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, has introduced natural solutions to promote healthy hair in men as they age gracefully. With statistics showing that by the age of 35, two-thirds of American men may face hair-related concerns, the brand aims to provide products that support men in maintaining their physical edge. This initiative targets men who are seeking to address issues of hair loss and promote overall hair health. The brand's offerings are designed to cater to the specific needs of men looking to sustain their youthful appearance and confidence.

data.title: EMA recommends higher dose of Wegovy® for obesity, facilitating 20.7% weight loss on average, advancing in EU.
data.description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has approved the introduction of a new 7.2 mg dose of Wegovy® in the European Union (EU), marking a significant step forward in its availability in the region.
Fed's Hammack: Price stability over the long term will support job growth.

data.title: EdgeMode is conducting a portfolio review and boosting AI data center development in Spain.
data.description: EdgeMode recently revealed their plan to conduct a strategic review of their portfolio, while also focusing on advancing their AI data center development pipeline in Spain. This initiative aims to streamline their operations and optimize their investments to drive growth. The company is contemplating the potential divestment of certain assets to maximize value and generate more revenue. Additionally, they have stated that they will be increasing their investment in AI data center projects in Spain, with plans to invest approximately $50 million over the next year. This move aligns with their objective to capitalize on the growing demand for data centers in the region and strengthen their foothold in the market.

China strongly rejected the EU’s comments on its human rights situation. Beijing called on the EU to halt “megaphone diplomacy,” refrain from politicizing and instrumentalizing human rights issues, and stop interfering in the internal affairs of other countries.

data.title: YouTube, owned by Alphabet, offers U.S. creators option to receive payouts in PayPal's stablecoin, PYUSD.
data.description: Alphabet's YouTube has announced that U.S. creators can now choose to receive their payouts in stablecoins. This new option allows them to receive earnings in PayPal's stablecoin. PayPal Holdings Inc's head of crypto, May Zabaneh, confirmed this development. The feature utilizes PayPal's payout infrastructure, ensuring that YouTube does not directly handle any crypto. This move signifies a growing trend in Big Tech, as platforms like YouTube adapt to the digital currency landscape.

data.title: Do Kwon has been sentenced to 15 years in prison for a $40 billion fraud involving Terra Luna, bringing closure to victims of the 2022 collapse.
data.description: The verdict delivers a sense of closure and justice for the numerous individuals affected by the downfall of Terra and its UST stablecoin in 2022.

data.title: Rutherford Energy Ventures partners with ORNL and DOE to commercialize fusion technology in new pilot program called FULCRA.
data.description: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, Rutherford Energy Ventures (REV) and the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) have teamed up to launch a pioneering public-private partnership initiative aimed at fast-tracking the advancement of vital infrastructure and necessary technologies for the commercialization of fusion power. The pilot project will introduce FULCRA (Fusion Upscaled Leveraged Consortia for Rapid Acceleration), with Oak Ridge National Laboratory (ORNL) designated as the location for the initial trial program. This collaboration seeks to enhance the development of fusion energy and position the United States as a leader in this field.

data.title: Constellation wins Platts Global Energy Award for deal with Microsoft, a 20-year PPA in 2025.
data.description: In Baltimore, Constellation received the prestigious title of "Energy Deal of the Year" at the 2025 Platts Global Energy Awards. The recognition was for a remarkable 20-year power purchase agreement with tech giant Microsoft.

data.title: NFEC introduces National Life Skills Council & Certified Life Skills Instructor to boost life readiness, workforce outcomes.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, in Dallas, the National Financial Educators Council (NFEC) introduced the National Life Skills Council (NLSC) and its latest certification, the Certified Life Skills Instructor. The NFEC, accredited by IACET and a Certified B Corporation, is a reputable organization in the financial education sector. This initiative aims to enhance life skills education, with the new certification offering professional development for individuals in this field. This announcement marks a significant step in promoting life skills education, indicating a commitment to improving essential skills among individuals.

data.title: TVL is no longer a reliable DeFi metric. Smart investors now focus on USDT, USDC, and USDe stablecoin issuance which serves as a genuine signal in the crypto market. TVL was inflated by token prices and recursive loops, leading to false indicators. Incentives distort TVL.
data.description: Total Value Locked (TVL) has long been considered an indicator of DeFi's health - when it's high, the sector is deemed 'thriving,' and when it's low, DeFi is seen as 'in decline.' However, during 2025, this narrative began to shift as the crypto market changed rapidly. Now, smart investors and analysts are paying more attention to stablecoin issuance for USDT, USDC, and new programmatic dollars like USDe as a more reliable signal. This is because stablecoin supply growth is seen as a more genuine indicator of the market's health as it cannot be faked. TVL has become inflated by token prices and is not as accurate as it once was. The figure is distorted by factors like liquid staking tokens, leverage spirals, and incentives, leading to a false representation of the underlying liquidity in DeFi. Essentially, stablecoin issuance is now considered a better metric for assessing the health of the crypto market compared to TVL.
